testcase.name: tests

error.message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //h3[contains(text(),'Test automation') because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//h3[contains(text(),'Test automation')' is not a valid XPath expression.
